description:
Developer browser with automatic Eruda console injection
ConsoleFlow is a developer-focused Android browser built on WebView.
It automatically injects Eruda — a mobile-friendly JavaScript console —
into every page you visit, so you can inspect elements, debug scripts,
view network requests, and catch errors directly on your device without
needing a desktop.

Features:
- Automatic Eruda console injection on all pages
- Custom JavaScript injection per session
- Desktop mode (switches User-Agent to Chrome desktop)
- Bookmarks and browsing history
- Find in page
- Multiple search engines: Google, DuckDuckGo, Bing, Brave
- Dark theme throughout
- Download manager integration
- No telemetry, no tracking, no ads
